description.en: List documents from Readwise Reader with filtering and pagination support.
description.de: Listet Dokumente aus Readwise Reader mit Filter- und Paginierungsoptionen.
description.es: List documents from Readwise Reader with filtering and pagination support.
description.fr: List documents from Readwise Reader with filtering and pagination support.
description.ro: List documents from Readwise Reader with filtering and pagination support.
description.it: List documents from Readwise Reader with filtering and pagination support.

vars.API_KEY: env:READWISE_API_KEY|Get your Reader API token from https://readwise.io/reader_api

description.en: Only include documents updated after this ISO timestamp.
description.es: Only include documents updated after this ISO timestamp.
description.fr: Only include documents updated after this ISO timestamp.
description.ro: Only include documents updated after this ISO timestamp.
description.it: Only include documents updated after this ISO timestamp.

description.en: Filter by location (new, later, shortlist, archive, feed).
description.es: Filter by location (new, later, shortlist, archive, feed).
description.fr: Filter by location (new, later, shortlist, archive, feed).
description.ro: Filter by location (new, later, shortlist, archive, feed).
description.it: Filter by location (new, later, shortlist, archive, feed).

description.en: Filter by document category (article, email, tweet, video, note, pdf, etc).
description.es: Filter by document category (article, email, tweet, video, note, pdf, etc).
description.fr: Filter by document category (article, email, tweet, video, note, pdf, etc).
description.ro: Filter by document category (article, email, tweet, video, note, pdf, etc).
description.it: Filter by document category (article, email, tweet, video, note, pdf, etc).

description.en: Include html_content in each document result.
description.es: Include html_content in each document result.
description.fr: Include html_content in each document result.
description.ro: Include html_content in each document result.
description.it: Include html_content in each document result.

description.en: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
description.es: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
description.fr: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
description.ro: Pagination cursor from a previous response.
description.it: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

description.en: Number of documents per page (max 1000 according to Reader API docs).
description.es: Number of documents per page (max 1000 according to Reader API docs).
description.fr: Number of documents per page (max 1000 according to Reader API docs).
description.ro: Number of documents per page (max 1000 according to Reader API docs).
